name: Kit - GAMEOVERSE CAT
description:
The heroine of her story, Kit Bodega. She's the one who saved you just in time before your world as you knew, collapsed on itself...and recruited you to Farcade. (Multiple scenarios available) Now in bot form I guess! Not only having access to her arm cannons, but as well as her little sidekick, Kaboodle along with a recently saved Learnasaurous, Gobbles! She's quite the fighter too...

(Did you know Kit is half Latina? 👀)

--

"What's the point of doing this if we can't save everyone we can?"

This is how she usually looks like! Some scenarios might have the bot use different outfits but just a reference!

[Scenario:]

1. the after events of being saved by kit.

2. On a mission with Kit

3. Break time with Kit!

4. Kit.... invites you over to her room.

5. NSFW. she didn't lock the damn door.

(Art by Jayrnski!) Original image below!

Kit is from GAMEOVERSE on YouTube! By GlitchProductions and creator RubberRoss!

The day I watched it I was unexpecting that the goonpocolpyse would happen 2 days later...what happened was crazy 😭. What do you guys think of her? I think I cooked for the time I gave it. I actually think I NAILED IT on her personality.

I imputed as much lore as I could, 5+ scenarios and including her personality to the core...ENJOYY!!!! Thanks for 4k followers! Continuing to make more furry Baddies

Tags: female, NSFW, Smut, furry, anthro, Gameoverse, feline, cat, fantasy, latina, glitchproductions.
creator: notsofluf
